summary: Frontend testing for Module 2 UI/access control changes. All 10 test scenarios passed. Admin dept user sees full employee list, Settings nav, FAB button, Edit+Delete menus. No status dots/offline text on employee cards. Own card delete correctly hidden. Sidebar shows employee data from DB.
seed_data_creation: Created new test session in MongoDB for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Module 2 access control features verified: sidebar (Employees/Performance/Settings for admin), no status dots on employee cards, admin sees all employees + FAB + Edit+Delete menus, own card delete correctly hidden, sidebar profile shows employee DB data (name+work_email). GM001=Admin dept, GM002=Operations dept.
tests_passed: Sidebar nav: Employees, Performance, Settings all visible for Admin dept user
Employee cards: NO online/offline status dots or text
Admin user: ALL employees visible (GM001 + GM002)
Admin user: Edit + Delete options in 3-dot menu for non-own cards
Admin user: Only Edit (no Delete) in 3-dot menu for own card
Admin user: Add Employee FAB visible
Settings nav: Visible for Admin dept user
Sidebar profile: Shows employee name (Admin GrowItUp) and work_email (info.growitup@gmail.com) from DB
No status indicators (green/grey dots) anywhere on employee cards
